p1_string_of_nickels.physical_facts: Yellow pot; dense foliage; leaves remain turgid.
p1_string_of_nickels.explanatory_transformations: Stable throughout the 5-day sequence; no significant morphological shifts observed.
p1_string_of_nickels.visual_health_reasoning: Healthy. Leaf turgidity is maintained; no signs of chlorosis or desiccation.

p2_mexican_mint.physical_facts: Black pot; two primary leaves and smaller central growth.
p2_mexican_mint.explanatory_transformations: The central growth has remained static; leaf margins show persistent, non-progressive dehydration.
p2_mexican_mint.visual_health_reasoning: Stressed. Visual evidence of marginal dehydration persists; growth is currently stalled.

p3_pothos.physical_facts: Black pot; two leaves; white rabbit anchor present.
p3_pothos.explanatory_transformations: Leaf posture is consistent with previous observations; no new necrosis on the tip.
p3_pothos.visual_health_reasoning: Stable. The plant is maintaining its current state; no progression of tip necrosis.

p4_silver_guest.physical_facts: Black pot; small seedling near rim.
p4_silver_guest.explanatory_transformations: Remains in a dormant or slow-growth phase; no change in leaf orientation.
p4_silver_guest.visual_health_reasoning: Stable. No signs of active decline or rapid expansion.

biome_observations.soil_surface: Presence of white particulate matter (perlite/additives) is consistent across the sequence.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: The AC power cycle has not resulted in visible soil surface changes (e.g., no rapid drying or fungal blooms).

vision_report.temporal_deltas: The sequence shows a high degree of stasis. The most notable change was the initial placement of white particulate matter, which has remained stable, indicating no recent soil disturbance or rapid evaporation.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a 'Rested State'. The cooling trial (25C) has not yet manifested as a visual change in plant turgor or soil moisture levels. The plants are currently in a holding pattern.
vision_report.anomalies: None. The white material on the soil is confirmed as a successful outcome of user care (per previous instructions).
vision_report.narrative_description: I have audited the sequence from the earliest image to the current state. The plants are stable. The Mexican Mint (p2) continues to show signs of marginal stress, but this is not progressing. The Pothos (p3) and String of Nickels (p1) are holding their baseline health. The recent AC adjustment has not yet impacted the visual physiology of the specimens.
